reasoning: The primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. In your last ride, the average power was significantly below target, showing room to build aerobic base. By targeting over-unders on Emigration Canyon, we aim to improve your ability to maintain higher power for longer durations, crucial for handling the 8.5-mile climb in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3 sets of 8-minute over-unders: 6 minutes at 209-223W, then 2 minutes at 242-256W, with 4-minute recovery at 50% FTP between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
